title: Hut 8 GPU-as-a-Service Vertical Goes Live with Inaugural Deployment
text: Hut 8 Highrise AI GPU-as-Service Launch. Infrastructure: Highrise AI subsidiary launched inaugural GPU cluster with 1,000 NVIDIA H100 GPUs. HPE Cray supercomputers from tier-three Chicago data center. Five-year agreement with AI cloud developer combining fixed infrastructure payments with revenue-sharing. Partnership: Collaborated with Hewlett Packard Enterprise and AdvizeX for design, configuration, commissioning. HPE emphasized commitment to supporting Hut 8's ambitions. Strategic Diversification: Portfolio expansion across AI compute, Bitcoin mining, traditional cloud services. CEO Asher Genoot: Launch further diversifies compute layer across twenty-site North American portfolio. Financial Positioning: AI compute business expected to be accretive financially and strategically, driving revenue growth and long-term value creation. Market Context: Signals how legacy infrastructure operators capitalizing on AI infrastructure demand. Represents meaningful portfolio expansion and revenue diversification.
